title: Inspect the live x-auto production runtime state for the 2026-04-09 06:50 note-lead row notion_page_id 3386b8c0-f0ac-81fb-ae7a-ccdb584f43e2. Check heartbeat/log expectations from repo files only, do not mutate anything. Report whether runtime appears healthy and whether the row looks scheduler-safe...
summary_text: Short answer: **Runtime looks unhealthy; the row is **not** scheduler-safe in its current state.** ### 1) Runtime health (x-auto production-style watchdog view) - Heartbeat age is far beyond the in-repo threshold. - `scripts/check_heartbeat.sh` sets `STALE_THRESHOLD_SECONDS=300` (5 min). - Current `/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/logs/heartbeat.json` timestamp is `2026-04-08T12:29:45`, while current host time is `2026-04-08 18:19:08 +0900` (~349 min old). - Running the watchdog script returns: `Alert sent` and would flag this as stale. - The runtime log/heartbeat timestamps also stopped at `12:30` today, and there is no live scheduler process (`ps` did not show `scheduler.py`). - So by repo-defined checks, scheduler process health is **not currently healthy**. ### 2) 2026-04-09 06:50 row (`notion_page_id: 3386b8c0-f0ac-81fb-ae7a-ccdb584f43e2`) scheduler safety - The row is present as: - `status: approved` - `scheduled_for: 2026-04-09 06:50` - `schedule_mode: fixed_slots` - Repo slot rules reserve Monday/Thursday `06:50` from fixed-slot scheduling (`RESERVED_NOTE_LEAD_SLOT`) in [post_generator.py](file:///Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/post_generator.py). - Therefore on Thursday (`2026-04-09` is Thursday), `is_valid_slot_for_day(..., schedule_mode="fixed_slots")` is false for `06:50`. - `_slot_policy_blocks_post` uses this and will block the post from due-post selection, so this row is **currently not scheduler-safe** unless it is switched to `operator_override` (with override reason) or rescheduled. ### 3) Additional runtime-visible signal - There is an older stale-snapshot warning for this same notion row in [scheduler logs](file:///Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/logs/scheduler.log) and [scheduler.jsonl](file:///Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/logs/scheduler.jsonl) from `2026-04-06`, so this row has previously hit sync timing conflict checks, but that is historical relative to current queue state. If you want, I can also give you the exact minimal edit list to make this row scheduler-safe (without touching other rows).
